documents.name: prescription-arjun.pdf
documents.previewText:
CITY CARE HOSPITAL
Outpatient Prescription
Date: 05 April 2026

Patient Name: Arjun Mehta
Age: 32 years | Male
OPD No.: CCH-OPD-2026-09341

Diagnosis: Dengue Fever with Thrombocytopenia (ICD-10: A97.1)

Rx:
1. Tab Paracetamol 650mg — TDS x 5 days
2. Syp Electral — 200ml twice daily
3. Inj. PlateMax IV (Standard Dengue Protocol Injection)
   Dose: 1 vial per administration
   Frequency: As per dengue protocol (refer billing)
4. Tab Pantoprazole 40mg — OD before food x 5 days
5. Complete rest, high fluid intake

Follow-up: 3 days
Dr. Rakesh Iyer | MBBS, MD (Internal Medicine)
Reg No.: MCI-2011-44892

documents.name: platelet-report.pdf
documents.previewText:
METRO DIAGNOSTICS LAB
NAABL Accredited | Lab Reg: MH-LAB-2018-00234
Date: 05 April 2026 | Report Time: 11:30 AM

Patient Name: Arjun Mehta
Age/Sex: 32Y / Male
Ref. Doctor: Dr. Rakesh Iyer
Sample Type: Venous Blood

--- COMPLETE BLOOD COUNT ---
Haemoglobin: 13.2 g/dL        (Normal: 13-17)
Total WBC: 3,200 cells/mcL     (LOW — Normal: 4,000-11,000)
Platelet Count: 68,000/mcL     (CRITICALLY LOW — Normal: 1,50,000-4,00,000)
Haematocrit: 41%               (Normal: 40-50%)

--- DENGUE SEROLOGY ---
NS1 Antigen: POSITIVE
IgM Anti-Dengue: POSITIVE
IgG Anti-Dengue: NEGATIVE

Remarks: Platelet count critically low. Immediate medical supervision
recommended. Results consistent with early acute dengue infection.

Authorised by: Dr. Sunita Rao, MD Pathology

documents.name: billing-invoice.pdf
documents.previewText:
CITY CARE HOSPITAL
TAX INVOICE
Invoice No.: CCH-INV-2026-003847
Date: 06 April 2026

Patient Name: Arjun Mehta
IP No.: CCH-IP-2026-00892
Policy No.: HDFC-ERGO-2025-991203
Admission: 05 April 2026 | Discharge: 06 April 2026

--- ITEMISED BILLING ---
Room Charges (General Ward, 1 night): INR 2,500
Doctor Consultation (2 visits): INR 1,400
Nursing Charges: INR 800
IV Fluids (NS 500ml x 3): INR 900
Tab Paracetamol 650mg x 15: INR 225
Tab Pantoprazole 40mg x 2: INR 80
Syp Electral 200ml x 2: INR 140

Inj. PlateMax IV — Administration 1 (05 Apr, 08:00 AM): INR 4,200
Inj. PlateMax IV — Administration 2 (05 Apr, 02:00 PM): INR 4,200
Inj. PlateMax IV — Administration 3 (05 Apr, 09:00 PM): INR 4,200

Diagnostic Tests (outsourced to Metro Diagnostics): INR 1,800
Consumables & Disposables: INR 650

--- TOTAL BILLED: INR 21,095 ---
GST (5%): INR 1,055
GRAND TOTAL: INR 22,150

Cashless Claim Amount Requested: INR 22,150
